results.title: MITAOE | Shutterbugs Photography
results.text:
MITAOE
Shutterbugs Photography
WELCOME TO THE SHUTTERBUGS CLUB AT MITAOE, ALANDI
Are you passionate about photography and eager to explore the fascinating world of visual storytelling? Look no further! The Shutterbugs Club at MITAOE is your gateway to a thriving photography community that offers a myriad of opportunities to hone your skills, engage with like-minded individuals, and bridge the gap between academia and the professional photography world.
Cultivating Creativity and Community
Our mission is to foster the art of photography through various exciting initiatives. We organize photography competitions and captivating exhibits, all centred on diverse themes. These events serve as platforms for students and academics to showcase their distinctive viewpoints and photographic prowess. At the Shutterbugs Club, we believe that every picture tells a story, and we're here to help you tell yours.
Education and Skill Enhancement
To help you sharpen your photography skills, we offer training sessions & workshops which helps in mastering camera techniques to refining post-processing skills. Whether you're a novice or a seasoned photographer, our educational opportunities are tailored to your needs.
Connecting You to the Pros
Photography isn't just an art; it's a profession. We understand the importance of bridging the gap between the academic realm and the professional photography world. The Shutterbugs Club invites experienced photographers and alumni experts of club to deliver talks and lectures. These sessions provide you with real-world insights, career guidance, and inspiration.
Discover Your Path
Our club hosts informative sessions that demystify the myriad of opportunities available for photographers. Explore potential career paths, network with professionals, and embark on your photography journey with confidence.
Community Engagement through Photography
We believe in the power of photography to make a positive impact on the local community. Our club frequently collaborates with other campus clubs and organizations, creating innovative projects that combine photography with various fields of interest. By participating in outreach projects, we aim to harness the visual arts for social good.
Enriching Campus Life
Beyond photography, the Shutterbugs Club plays a crucial role in enhancing the artistic and creative atmosphere of our college campus. Our activities and projects contribute to the cultural richness of our academic community, making our institute a vibrant hub for visual storytelling and creative expression.
Join us at the Shutterbugs Club and embark on a journey where your passion for photography meets a supportive community, education, and real-world opportunities. It's time to capture the world, one frame at a time!
Faculty Advisor: Mr. Amol Madhav Kapse, SCE
Core Team: Prathamesh Yadav, Hemanshu Chaurasia, Jenish Panchal, Ruchish, Nidhi Ochani
1st Prize in Chitra Pradarshan Photography: Our talented photographers clinched the 1st Prize at the Chitra Pradarshan Photography competition organized by MITCON Institute of Management, Balewadi, Pune.
COEP MindSparks Exhibition: We were honored with an invitation to showcase our work at the College of Engineering Pune's MindSparks Exhibition. This event allowed us to connect with other photography clubs, fostering new opportunities.
OnePlus Student Community Collaboration: In September, we collaborated with the OnePlus Student Community, providing a platform to showcase our photography skills. Our club members shared their OnePlus-captured photos with hashtags like #CampusShotOnOneplus and #OPSAP, significantly expanding our community.
Sony BBC Earth Photography Success: Rutwik Deshmukh, a member of Shutterbugs MITAOE, achieved recognition in the Sony BBC Earth Photography Competition's People's category. He qualified for the Top 10 with a substantial number of votes in the public voting round.
These accomplishments reflect our commitment to nurturing creativity and excellence in photography at MITAOE, Alandi. We continue to inspire and empower our students to shine in the world of visual storytelling.
1. Photography Exhibits:
Physical and virtual displays of university students' and faculty's work.
Themes or open subjects provide a creative space for showcasing art.

2. Photography Competitions:

results.title: MITAOE | TEDxMITAOE
results.text:
MITAOE
TEDxMITAOE

“We Aspire to Inspire.”

WHAT IS TED?

TED, which stands for Technology, Entertainment, and Design, is an annual event that brings together the world's leading thinkers and doers to share their ideas that matter in any discipline — technology, entertainment, design, science, humanities, business, and development.

TED is a global community, that welcomes people from every discipline and culture who seek a deeper understanding of the world.

We believe passionately in the power of ideas to change attitudes, lives, and, ultimately, the world.

WHAT IS TEDx ?

TEDx is a community initiative, created in the spirit of TED’s overall mission to research and discover “ideas worth spreading.”

TEDx brings the spirit of TED to spark conversation, connection, and community.

TEDx events are duly operated under a license from TED where we try and seek to uncover new ideas and to share the latest research in the local areas that spark conversations in our communities with a deep sense of passion and dedication.

What is TEDxMITAOE?

TEDxMITAOE is an independent TEDx event organized at MIT Academy of Engineering, Pune, an autonomous institute affiliated with Savitribai Phule Pune University.

This platform was created to promote TED’s vision of ‘Ideas Worth Spreading’, on a community scale.

This year at TEDxMITOE we aim to skyrocket to the unexplored limits of our very own personality through our theme “SONIC BOOM”.

What will you find at the event?

The content and design of each TEDx event are unique and developed independently, although all TEDx events are based on a standard protocol.

A series of brief and well-prepared talks, demonstrations, and performances (Live or TEDTalks from TED.com)

A diverse spectrum of topics that encourage study, inspiration, and curiosity.

Two pre-recorded presentations from the celebrated TEDTalks video series
Purely idea-centric and inspiring talks - No commercial, religious, or political agenda
TEDxMITAOE 2022-23
Every adventurous new beginning comes with challenges that knock us down, yet pursuing our passion and overcoming hurdles makes us stronger and undefeatable.

To truly do something monumental and unveil the finest version of ourselves we need to take risks and look up to the unimaginable.

We need to step out of our comfort zone and face our fears.

Limits like fears are often an illusion.

This year at TEDxMITAOE we aim to skyrocket to the unexplored limits of our very own personality through our theme “SONIC BOOM”.

On our path toward our passion and ideals, we strive to be fearless, grow to be our best, and break down all known boundaries.

No excuses, No fears, No limits.

We intend to spark intriguing conversations here at TEDxMITAOE 22-23 and share the narratives of our illustrious speakers who are epitomes of thinking beyond the box.

We yearn to bring to light ideologies and inventions that have proliferated and outshined the rest of the globe.

And who knows?

We might accomplish the unfathomable and shock the world, just like Chuck Yeager did in the Bell X-1 on October 14, 1947, when he was the first human to fly faster than the speed of sound!!!

results.title: MITAOE | Prakalp
results.text:
MITAOE
Prakalp
About IIChE Students Chapter:
IIChE student chapter of School of Chemical Engineering is honoured with “Pidilite Industries Best Student Chapter Award” for the year 2013 for being adjudged the Best Student Chapter among all other student chapter under Indian Institute of Chemical Engineers. SCHEMCON – 2015 was successfully organized by the chapter in September 2015 on the theme ‘Sustainable Development for Better Tomorrow’. It was for the first time in western region.
About PRAKALP 2024:
PRAKALP, a prestigious technical event organized by the Indian Institute of Chemical Engineers (IIChE) Students’ Chapter School of Chemical Engineering, MIT Academy of Engineering (MITAoE). This event has a remarkable history of bringing together passionate chemical engineering enthusiasts and industry professionals for knowledge exchange and skill enhancement. As a highly significant event in the field of chemical engineering, PRAKAP has consistently served as a platform for fostering innovation, promoting sustainable practices and shaping the future of the chemical engineering landscape. With each passing year, PRAKALP continues to elevate the standards of excellence, making it an unmissable event for all aspiring engineers seeking to make a mark in the world of chemical engineering.
About Theme:
PRAKALP 2024 will revolve around the pivotal themes of "Green Technology" and "Sustainability, " aiming to highlight the crucial role that chemical engineers play in advancing eco-friendly solutions and driving sustainable practices across industries. Green Technology and Sustainability form an interwoven connection that champions innovative solutions to protect the planet's delicate ecosystem. Embracing renewable resources and sustainable practices, green technology aims to create a cleaner and healthier environment for all living beings. Energy-efficient buildings, powered by smart grids and integrated with green roofs, exemplify a harmonious coexistence between nature and human-made structures. This technical event is centred around the theme of green technology and sustainability serves as an inspiring platform to showcase the latest advancements in eco-friendly innovations and their potential to shape a sustainable future.

Sports
Why AreSports Important in Education?

Sports are an essential component of well-rounded education since they engage the student, both physically and mentally.

School sports activities can develop discipline, teamwork, and a sense of persistence that helps students learn critical life skills that are important outside the academic world.

Virtually the minute you invest in student fitness programs, you invest in active youth, the intellectual development that comes from reducing stress, and health over time, something that is vital in this ever-changing educational world we live in.

Studies have shown that physical activity has a positive effect on cognitive development.

Therefore, students who are physically active have a positive impact on academic performance and sports as they are more likely to possess improved focus, memory, and problem-solving skills.

When students participate in sporting activities regularly, it builds confidence, leadership skills, social skills, and a sense of camaraderie among peers who support one another.

Schools that prioritise the importance of school sports help students become balanced individuals, capable of dealing with challenges with resolve and determination.

In addition to physical development, extracurricular sports programs educate one in patience, perseverance, and the process of accepting victory or defeat with grace.

Instilling these habits early sets the tone for individuals to have lifelong fitness, teambuilding, and personal growth habits so that they grow personally and emotionally to be able to tackle new challenges in life.

What Are the Benefits of Participating in Sports?

The role of sports in school has numerous positive outcomes that support personal, social, and academic growth.

Organised extracurricular sport activities help students to become healthier physically, more resilient in terms of endurance, and more coordinated, supplementing structured student fitness programs designed to ensure energy and vitality maintenance.

Sports also boost mental resistance, focus, and stress coping, consequently supporting enhanced academic and sporting performances.

From a social perspective, school sport events and activities offer opportunities for cooperation, communication, and leadership skills, creating opportunities for students to socialise and apply teamwork practices in real life with other students.

Engaging in sports also promotes skills like discipline, time management, and goal achievement, which in turn boost self-esteem and promote overall mental well-being.

In recognising the importance of school sports activities, academic institutions provide opportunities beyond academic attainment for students to flourish, supporting student well-being and satisfaction through concrete achievements.

The friendships, encouragement, and personal development that sports provide generate healthy competition, perspective, and perseverance to participate and face challenges, while providing balance and an active lifestyle.

Engaging in sport develops holistic skills that apply to all students’ lives as they transcend the educational experience and beyond.

How Are Sports Programs Conducted?(MIT AOE)

The MIT Academy of Engineering (MIT AOE) provides school sporting events and extracurricular programs that are intentional and sequenced to engage students and support their holistic learning and development.

The campus has great, well-resourced facilities to support exercise, such as basketball and volleyball courts, a football ground, a cricket ground, and a gymnasium, to facilitate student fitness programs.

MIT AOE offers inter-college competitions, wellness workshops and fitness challenges, where the value of sport in schools is communicated as an integral part of student life.

results.title: Infrastructure and Facilities at MIT AOE: A Practical Overview for Students
section_path: Infrastructure and Facilities at MIT AOE: A Practical Overview for Students
results.text:
Infrastructure and Facilities at MIT AOE: A Practical Overview for Students
Infrastructure and Facilities at MIT AOE
When you first walk into the MIT Academy of Engineering, what you notice is not at all just the buildings.

It is the way everything feels ready for students.

For example, there are spaces where people hang around before class, and labs that smell faintly of machines and new wires.

Then there are quiet corners where you can catch up on notes.

Infrastructure and facilities shape how easy it is actually to get things done while you are here.

MIT AOE’s campus isn’t massive, but it’s well thought out.

Each building seems to have a clear job, so you’re not wandering for ages trying to find a lab or a classroom.

There’s usually a buzz between lectures, with students moving quickly from one block to another.

Even the walkways are planned so you do not waste time during busy days.

What infrastructure and facilities are available on campus?

Students here have access to proper campus facilities.

This covers everything from the classrooms you sit in every day to the labs you visit for practicals, the library, and a few simple places to grab food or study in groups.

There’s a dedicated building for each department, so it’s easy to find your teachers or lab supervisors.

The central library is bigger than you’d expect and stays pretty busy, especially before exams.

Labs are updated with what each department needs — you’ll see all the standard equipment, and nothing is outdated.

There are computer rooms with internet.

Hostels are available (though spots fill up quickly).

If you want a break, there’s a cafeteria and a few shaded areas outside that are good for quick chats or revision.

MIT AOE has also worked to keep things clean and safe.

You’ll find staff around most days making sure the equipment is working and the common areas are tidy.

How do facilities support student learning?

The academic infrastructure does what it should.

For example, classrooms are simple but have projectors and whiteboards.

And labs are scheduled so you actually get time to use the gear.

Group study is a real thing here — the library has dedicated spots for both solo learning and team work.

Teachers actively use technology in classrooms, going beyond traditional chalk-and-talk methods.

Assignments and projects become easier to manage with ready access to computers and printing facilities.

Student amenities like sports spaces and standard rooms give you a reason to stay back on campus instead of heading straight home after classes.

When the pressure ramps up, having good spaces makes it less stressful to finish significant assignments or prepare for finals.

Are research facilities included in the campus infrastructure?

Yes, research facilities are part of the setup.

Postgrads and final-year students use dedicated labs and project rooms for their research work.

Some departments have their own spaces with specialised equipment.

There is also access to online journals and a few technical publications in the library for anyone doing a project or looking to publish.

Why facilities matter at MIT AOE
At MIT AOE, attention to details means you do not have to scramble for basic things.

You get your lab time, you find the right teacher, and you’ve got a dedicated spot to study.

Modern classrooms and practical labs aren’t a luxury; they’re part of ensuring students actually learn what they’re supposed to.

When facilities work, students waste less time and can focus on the parts of uni that matter most.

Wrapping Up
Infrastructure at MIT AOE is smart and student-friendly.

results.title: Sports
results.text:
MIT AOE offers inter-college competitions, wellness workshops and fitness challenges, where the value of sport in schools is communicated as an integral part of student life.

Participation in sport is a way to gain academic and athletic experience as students learn to manage and sustain difficult engineering coursework through their participation in fitness.

Faculty mentors guide students, where they learn teamwork, strategic planning, and leadership.

Instituting sports into the daily delivery of MIT AOE, a private college in Pune for engineering students, can ensure that they lead balanced lives that facilitate physical well-being, integrated with mental toughness and social skills.

It transforms students into health-focused professionals who also have the grit necessary to be excited to engage in challenging experiences.

Sports at MIT AOE are not merely an extra-curricular activity, but rather an essential aspect of campus life where fitness, education, and self-enhancement are intertwined.

How is Research Conducted?

( MIT AOE )
Research at MIT Academy of Engineering (MIT AOE) is done in a systematic and experiential manner by integrating theoretical knowledge with practical exposure.

Students work on varied projects across streams such as Mechanical, Computer, Chemical, and Electronics Engineering with experienced faculty mentors.

The research methods at MIT AOE focus on problem identification, literature study, experimentation, data analysis, and documentation to produce rigorous results.

Sophisticated laboratories, fully equipped workshops, and collaborative areas facilitate cutting-edge research techniques, such as simulation, prototyping, and applied experimentation.

MIT AOE promotes scholarly research that complements industry requirements, developing internships, live projects, and research publications.

The integration of global inputs, industrial experience, and ethical conduct enables students to develop critical thinking and technical skills.

Opting for MIT AOE from the best private engineering colleges in Pune provides prospective engineers an opportunity to discover, innovate, and meaningfully contribute to technological and scientific growth.

Get in Touch
Education for the Next Generation to Built a Better World !!

Frequently Asked Questions
Getting ready to apply?

Check out the Admissions FAQ for answers to your questions on application requirements, deadlines, cost of attendance, residency, and more.

View All
1.

What programs does the MIT Academy of Engineering offer?

The MIT Academy of Engineering provides undergraduate and graduate degrees in a variety of engineering disciplines, including computer engineering, electronics and telecommunications engineering, mechanical engineering, civil engineering, and information technology.

2. Is the MIT Academy of Engineering a private college?

MIT Academic of Engineering is an Empowered Autonomous Engineering college, affiliated with Savitribai Phule Pune University.

3. Is the MIT Academy of Engineering linked with any university?

Yes, the MIT Academy of Engineering is associated with Savitribai Phule Pune University.

4.

What are the eligibility requirements for undergraduate engineering programs?
Students must have finished 10+2 or equivalent with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics and have a valid score on entrance exams such as JEE Main or MHT-CET.

5.

How can I apply for admission to the MIT Academy of Engineering?

During the admissions cycle, you can apply online via the official website.

The admissions page includes detailed instructions and forms.

And also you have to fill the CET application form for getting admission in any engineering college.

6.

Which entrance examinations are acceptable for Engineering admission?

The MIT Academy of Engineering accepts JEE Main, MHT-CET.

7.

When does the admission process begin?

Admissions normally begin in June after entrance exam results are announced.

8.

results.title: MITAOE | Dr. M. Karthik
results.text:
MITAOE
Dr. M. Karthik
NAME : Dr. M. Karthik
DESIGNATION : Assistant Professor
QUALIFICATION :
PhD (Chemical Engineering)
M Tech (Chemical Engineering)
OVERVIEW OF PROFILE :
Dr M Karthik is an Assistant Professor at School of Chemical Engineering, MIT Academy of Engineering, Alandi, Pune. He holds a doctorate in Chemical Engineering from IIT Bombay and he is a dedicated academic professional with a collective experience of over 2 years. A committed academician, his core areas of expertise include separation technology, water desalination and membrane technology, among others and also he has published research paper and conference papers. He has experience in the preparation and characterization of polymeric materials, composite and nanocomposite, membranes for molecular separation, water treatments, and energy generation. He holds memberships of professional societies including, Indian Institute of Chemical Engineers (IIChE), Institution of Chemical Engineering (IChemE) and International Association of Engineers (IAENG).
FORE FRONT AREA OF RESEARCH : Desalination, Membrane Technology, Separation Technology
EMAIL ID : karthikm@mitaoe.ac.in

EXPERIENCE : Teaching :2.3 Year

results.title: MITAOE | Worshops on Ipr/Rm
results.text:
The lecture was attended by faculty of MITAOE.

In this webinar Mr. Adnan discussed the importance of plagiarism.

He gave a walk through to the entire Turnitin software.

He explained in detail various features of the software besides plagiarism check.

ACTIVITY REPORT 3 Webinar on “Introduction to Turnitin Software” by Mr. Varun Research and Development Cell in association with Central Library had organised a expert lecture on “Introduction to Turnitin Software” for faculty on 28/04/2020 at 5:00 pm .

The Speaker for the webinar was Mr. Varun from Turnitin Software.

The lecture was attended by faculty of MITAOE.

In this webinar Mr Varun shared the step by step procedure of operating Turnitin software for plagiarism check.

He discussed in detail about similarity index, color coding for different sources.

He also discussed about self plagiarism, ramifications of keeping manuscript in repository, retrieval of manuscript from repository.

ACTIVITY REPORT 4 Nation level Webinar on Intellectual Property Rights Protection through Patent Research and Development Cell in association with Central Library had organised a expert lecture on “Intellectual Property Rights Protection through Patent” for Faculty on 06/06/2020 at 5:00 pm.

The Speaker of for the webinar was by Dr. Shri Ram, Nodal Officer, IPR Cell, Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology, Patiala, Punjab..

The lecture was attended by 223 faculties across pan India.

In this webinar Dr Shri Ram shared information of different types of Intellectual Property Rights like Patents, Copyrights and Trademarks.

He disseminated information related to different patent search agencies like WIPO, EPO, JPO, KIPO, SIPO, and USPTO.

In detail he explained different steps for national and international patent filing.

ACTIVITY REPORT 5 National level Webinar on “Devising Communication Strategy for Organization” Research and Development Cell in association with Central Library had organised an expert lecture on “Devising Communication Strategy for Organization” for Faculty on 13/06/2020 at 5:00 pm.

The Speaker of for the webinar was by Prof. Shantanu Ganguly, Fellow and Program Manager, Knowledge Resource Division, Project Management Unit, TERE, New Delhi.

The lecture was attended by 165 faculties across pan India.

In this webinar Dr. Shantanu Ganguly spoke about different aspects of knowledge Management like Knowledge Networking, KM Value Analysis, and Change management across different cultures globally.

He gave information related to various knowledge management systems, database management systems and devising communication strategy and content management.

ACTIVITY REPORT 6 National level Webinar on Research Data Management: Curation, Share, Use and Reuse”.

Research and Development Cell in association with Central Library had organised an expert lecture on “Research Data Management: Curation, Share, Use and Reuse” for Faculty on 17/06/2020 at 5:00 pm.

The Speaker of for the webinar was Prof. Dr. Ramesh Gaur, Dean and Director, Kala Nidhi Division, IGNCA, Ministry of Culture, Govt of India, New Delhi.

The lecture was attended by 470 faculties across pan India.

Dr. Ramesh Gaur explained importance of research data management in research process.

His talk was focused on how to create, organise, preserving and extracting the research data.

results.title: MIT Academy of Engineering Placement Cell - Find Your Dream Job
section_path: MIT Academy of Engineering Placement Cell - Find Your Dream Job
results.text:
MIT Academy of Engineering Placement Cell
28 LPA Highest Package
6.1 LPA Average package
570+ Placement Offers
700+ Internship Offers
450+ Recruiting Companies
Dr. Shitalkumar Jain Group Director

-Placement and Corporate Relations
MITAOE is a highly regarded campus for leading multinational corporations seeking talent through campus placements.

The Corporate Relations and Placement Cell boast a legacy of facilitating top-notch placements for students, with our alumni making significant contributions across various sectors globally.

As a result, industry leaders frequent MITAOE to scout for engineers with innovative and reengineering prowess.

The Corporate Relations and Placement Cell fosters a robust Corporate Interface by organizing interactive sessions with industry veterans and providing soft-skills training to groom students for the corporate world.

It is committed to offering exceptional job opportunities and nurturing entrepreneurial aspirations among students.

Our vision and dedication drive us to groom students into self-made industrialists of the future.

The Cell focuses on preparing students for aptitude tests, honing their personalities, and fostering industry-institute collaborations.

With a mission to contribute to society through technological innovation, our students consistently demonstrate their value to recruiters, reinforcing the quality of education at MITAOE.

Over 4200 diverse companies span the country.

The following are the highlights of the Corporate Relations and Placement Cell activities:
Facilitate Campus Recruitment for both B.Tech.

and M.Tech.

aspirants.

Ensure each student receives at least one job offer.

Support students by sponsoring their participation in diverse projects and internship programs across various industries.

Cultivate avenues for students to pursue their preferred career paths alongside industry frontrunners.

Provide comprehensive personality development training to students to enhance their employability during the recruitment phase.

IT Companies
IT Service Companies
Core companies
IT Product Company
At MITAOE, we are proud to partner with a wide array of leading IT, Service and Core companies,
offering our students valuable placement opportunities.

These companies play a pivotal role in
helping our graduates transition from the classroom to the workforce, ensuring they are equipped
with the skills and knowledge needed to excel in the rapidly evolving tech industry.

IT Service Company
Core Company
Placement Team
The Placement Team at MITAOE is dedicated to guiding and supporting students throughout their career journey, ensuring they are well-prepared for successful placements.

Comprising experienced professionals and industry experts, our team works tirelessly to bridge the gap between academic learning and the professional world.

Placement Achievement
Students have been successfully placed in leading multinational companies, top IT firms, renowned
startups, and various industry leaders, further solidifying the reputation of MITAOE as a hub for
talent.

Through strategic industry tie-ups, skill enhancement programs, and rigorous interview
preparation, we ensure that our graduates are not only job-ready but also equipped to thrive in their
careers.

Check out the Admissions FAQ for answers to your questions on application requirements, deadlines, cost of attendance, residency, and more.

View All
1.

What programs does the MIT Academy of Engineering offer?

The MIT Academy of Engineering provides undergraduate and graduate degrees in a variety of engineering disciplines, including computer engineering, electronics and telecommunications engineering, mechanical engineering, civil engineering, and information technology.

2. Is the MIT Academy of Engineering a private college?

MIT Academic of Engineering is an Empowered Autonomous Engineering college, affiliated with Savitribai Phule Pune University.

results.title: Campus Placements Explained: What Students Should Know
section_path: Campus Placements Explained: What Students Should Know
results.text:
Campus Placements Explained: What Students Should Know
Placements aren’t just about landing your first job. For most students, they’re about gaining confidence, financial independence, and a practical start to their career. A good placement gives you early experience, real exposure to workplace expectations, and a smoother shift into the professional world.
The importance of placements lies in helping students apply what they've learnt while giving companies access to fresh talent.
Well-known organisations participate in graduate recruitment to hire engineers, analysts, developers, and management trainees directly from colleges. This process helps them build a pipeline of future-ready professionals and gives students real job opportunities right at the start of their careers.

results.text: Offering collaboration with world-leading companies like IBM, Zensar, KPIT, EMC2, Persistent, etc. students at MITAOE get to explore international trends, which helps them to build a robust career path. Besides, with industrial visits, guest lectures, technical competitions, sponsorship of technical events, hi-tech live projects, students are exposed to the global platform. Providing all these opportunities for the future of our country makes MITAOE one of the best private engineering colleges in Pune.

results.title: Best Private Engineering Colleges in Pune - MITAOE
section_path: Best Private Engineering Colleges in Pune - MITAOE
results.text:
Best Private Engineering Colleges in Pune
Engineering needs lots of learning, understanding, and is considered one of the most challenging fields. Without a results-oriented institution with an expert faculty to shape your enthusiastic mind, achieving what you truly desire after completing a course seems unattainable. Your future is at stake here, and what you choose decides your fate. Unlike well-reputed engineering institutions, the best private engineering colleges in Pune, like MITAOE, make sure that your future is in safe hands. Top in the engineering field in Pune, MITAOE (MIT Academy of Engineering), offers industry-oriented courses that guarantee placement in leading industries.
B.Tech and M.Tech Courses offered for engineering students.
Accredited by NBA (National Board of Accreditation) and NAAC, also honored with the prestige of Academic Autonomy, MIT Academy of Engineering (MITAOE), is one of the best engineering colleges in Pune where students apply every year for admission. From B.tech and M.Tech courses to vibrant campus life and training programs, students here get opportunities for both personal & career growth. The appointment of expert faculty strengthens the quality of education. The advanced B.Tech and M.Tech courses offered by MITAOE help students to be in the lead in this competitive field.
Courses offered in MIT Academy of Engineering (MITAOE)
With courses in fields like Electrical and Electronics Engineering, Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, IT, and Chemical Engineering, MITAOE attracts individuals with inventive capability, outstanding creativity, and enthusiasm to create solutions that make life easy. With career-oriented courses like M.Tech in Computers science, Mechanical Engineering, and Electronics (VLSI & Embedded Systems), students are equipped with confidence that comes from the progressive curriculum taught by faculties who skilfully impart technical and soft skills expected in the corporate world.
Admission/ examination and fees structure
With the course duration of four years, admission in B.Tech courses generally require 10+2 with 50% marks + MHT CET; fees is ₹1.55 Lakhs for a year. For M.Tech (2 years course) admissions, general criteria are Graduation + GATE, and the fees for a year is ₹1.21 Lakhs. Further, the fee structure varies depending upon the course and duration. The number of Intakes for M.Tech courses is 18 per course. MITAOE guarantees a practical and transparent evaluation system with the online mode of registration for exams and coordination with the parents for a smooth and credible examination system.

Without a results-oriented institution with an expert faculty to shape your enthusiastic mind, achieving what you truly desire after completing a course seems unattainable. Your future is at stake here, and what you choose decides your fate. Unlike well-reputed engineering institutions, the best private engineering colleges in Pune, like MITAOE, make sure that your future is in safe hands. Top in the engineering field in Pune, MITAOE (MIT Academy of Engineering), offers industry-oriented courses that guarantee placement in leading industries.
B.Tech and M.Tech Courses offered for engineering students.
Accredited by NBA (National Board of Accreditation) and NAAC, also honored with the prestige of Academic Autonomy, MIT Academy of Engineering (MITAOE), is one of the best engineering colleges in Pune where students apply every year for admission. From B.tech and M.Tech courses to vibrant campus life and training programs, students here get opportunities for both personal & career growth. The appointment of expert faculty strengthens the quality of education. The advanced B.Tech and M.Tech courses offered by MITAOE help students to be in the lead in this competitive field.
Courses offered in MIT Academy of Engineering (MITAOE)
With courses in fields like Electrical and Electronics Engineering, Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, IT, and Chemical Engineering, MITAOE attracts individuals with inventive capability, outstanding creativity, and enthusiasm to create solutions that make life easy. With career-oriented courses like M.Tech in Computers science, Mechanical Engineering, and Electronics (VLSI & Embedded Systems), students are equipped with confidence that comes from the progressive curriculum taught by faculties who skilfully impart technical and soft skills expected in the corporate world.
Admission/ examination and fees structure
With the course duration of four years, admission in B.Tech courses generally require 10+2 with 50% marks + MHT CET; fees is ₹1.55 Lakhs for a year. For M.Tech (2 years course) admissions, general criteria are Graduation + GATE, and the fees for a year is ₹1.21 Lakhs. Further, the fee structure varies depending upon the course and duration. The number of Intakes for M.Tech courses is 18 per course. MITAOE guarantees a practical and transparent evaluation system with the online mode of registration for exams and coordination with the parents for a smooth and credible examination system.

results.title: Meet the Minds Behind the Learning: Understanding MIT AOE’s Faculty Directory
section_path: Meet the Minds Behind the Learning: Understanding MIT AOE’s Faculty Directory
results.text:
Meet the Minds Behind the Learning: Understanding MIT AOE’s Faculty Directory
What Is the Faculty Directory?

The faculty directory at MIT AOE gives students a clear view of the academic framework across departments.

It highlights who leads each department.

This can be helpful when students need guidance, recommendations, or departmental approvals.

Each listing is department-specific and shows the name and designation of the Head of Department (HOD).

These pages also offer a general overview of the department's focus, the types of programmes offered, and, sometimes, the facilities available within each academic unit.

In this format, students get a reliable view of the leadership structure — even if complete individual faculty profiles are not shown for every teaching staff member.

How Can Students Access Faculty Profiles?
MIT AOE does not currently provide detailed public profiles for all teaching staff.

Nevertheless, information about departments and their heads is accessible through the official website.

Here’s how students can find it:
Visit www.mitaoe.ac.in
Select the Academics menu from the main navigation bar
Click on Academic Departments
Choose your department of interest
The page will display the Head of Department, along with department highlights and basic contact details
While this isn’t a comprehensive directory of all academic members, it does provide students with a verified way to identify who leads each department and where to direct subject-related questions.

What Information Is Available in the Directory?

The content you’ll find in the directory is brief but specific.

It typically includes:
Information Type
What You’ll See
Name
Full name of the Head of Department
Designation
Example: Professor, Associate Professor
Department
Assigned academic division
Contact Information
Email ID or college phone extension (if listed)

In some departments, a short write-up explains the department’s goals, academic strengths, and focus areas.

For those looking to understand who leads a particular subject stream, this information is helpful.

Why Is the Faculty Directory Important for Students?

At MIT AOE, the faculty structure plays a key role in how students access academic support, obtain approvals, and plan further studies.

Here’s why the faculty directory matters:
Follow these steps to apply for MIT AOE:
Quick access to academic contacts
Students often need help outside lecture hours — for lab queries, mini projects, or event planning.

Knowing who heads the department helps them reach out without confusion.

Clear department-level leadership
The directory lists the Head of Department (HOD) for each academic area.

This gives students a clear contact for subject or course-related matters.

Support with permissions and guidance
For approvals, project topics, or clarification on academic policies, students can directly approach their HOD through official channels.

Entry point for further academic interaction
While individual professors and lecturers aren’t listed publicly, the HOD can guide students to the right faculty members within the department.

Useful for research-focused students
Those looking to engage with research faculty or planning for higher studies can start by identifying which departments align with their interests.

Structured and reliableThe directory provides a verified, formal way to navigate the academic system.

Even without complete profiles, it supports student queries straightforwardly.

Closing Note
The university educators at MIT AOE form the backbone of its academic structure.

While full faculty listings aren’t published online, the department-level details help students find the right point of contact.

It’s a simple yet reliable system that supports clear academic communication.

Frequently Asked Questions
Getting ready to apply?

results.title: MITAOE | Faculty / Staff Affairs
results.text:
MITAOE
Faculty
All the matters related to the recruitment, establishment and welfare of faculty members and other staffs comes under the purview of the Dean, FSA. The main objective of Dean, FSA is to improve the quality of faculties and staff.
The major functions of the Office of Faculty & Staff Affairs are as mentioned below:
Recruitment process of Faculty and staff members.
Appointments of Visiting Faculty, Adjunct Faculty, Emeritus Professor, Distinguished Professor etc.
Confirmation, Extension, Re-employment, Transfer and promotion of Faculty and staff.
Issue of Service certificate,
Sanction of all types of leaves.
Faculty and staff welfare scheme.
Annual Appraisal process.
Defining the Job description, policies, HR manual etc.
Selection process of Teacher and Staff of the Year award.
Handling grievances.
Maintaining the discipline among faculty and staff.
Coordinate Training / workshop / Guest lectures for faculty and staff.
Mrs. Usha Verma,
Dean, Faculty & Staff Affairs (FSA)
Sr. Assistant Professor, School of Electrical Engineering
Email-ID dean.faculty@mitaoe.ac.in

results.title: Dr. Sunil Karad, Executive Director, Treasurer & Trustee MIT Group of Institutions | Pune | India
section_path: Dr. Sunil Karad, Executive Director, Treasurer & Trustee MIT Group of Institutions
results.text:
Dr. Sunil Karad, Executive Director, Treasurer & Trustee MIT Group of Institutions
Pune
Dr. SunilL Karad holds a PG Diploma in Strategy and Innovation from the revered Oxford University, a PhD & Masters from University of Sheffield in UK and a Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering from Pune University. He is credited with establishing 10+ new age educational institutions and going strong.
Dr. Sunil Karad is known for his abilities of comprehensive research, constructive planning and effective execution. An experienced professional in education and entrepreneurship management, he is a believer of positive outcomes. Currently Dr. Sunil is the Executive Director & Trustee at MIT Group of Institutions, being responsible for managing the growth and long-term success of various educational establishments developing a future of 50k+ learners annually.
Dr. Sunil Karad is extremely passionate about digital transformation and the founding force of Edugild: India’s global education technology accelerator for edtech startups. He leverages experience and reputation for excellence, to bring a positive impact in education and social community at large. Dr. Sunil Karad is a believer of technology being a transformation force, having supported new age ventures that leverage XR and AI to make education available and accessible to one and all.
For Appointments, Contact
Ms. Anju Hiranwar PS to Executive Director
Email: anju@mitpune.com

results.title: Meet the Minds Behind the Learning: Understanding MIT AOE’s Faculty Directory
section_path: Meet the Minds Behind the Learning: Understanding MIT AOE’s Faculty Directory
results.text:
Meet the Minds Behind the Learning: Understanding MIT AOE’s Faculty Directory
What Is the Faculty Directory?

The faculty directory at MIT AOE gives students a clear view of the academic framework across departments.

It highlights who leads each department.

This can be helpful when students need guidance, recommendations, or departmental approvals.

Each listing is department-specific and shows the name and designation of the Head of Department (HOD).

These pages also offer a general overview of the department's focus, the types of programmes offered, and, sometimes, the facilities available within each academic unit.

In this format, students get a reliable view of the leadership structure — even if complete individual faculty profiles are not shown for every teaching staff member.

How Can Students Access Faculty Profiles?
MIT AOE does not currently provide detailed public profiles for all teaching staff.

Nevertheless, information about departments and their heads is accessible through the official website.

Here’s how students can find it:
Visit www.mitaoe.ac.in
Select the Academics menu from the main navigation bar
Click on Academic Departments
Choose your department of interest
The page will display the Head of Department, along with department highlights and basic contact details
While this isn’t a comprehensive directory of all academic members, it does provide students with a verified way to identify who leads each department and where to direct subject-related questions.

What Information Is Available in the Directory?

The content you’ll find in the directory is brief but specific.

It typically includes:
Information Type
What You’ll See
Name
Full name of the Head of Department
Designation
Example: Professor, Associate Professor
Department
Assigned academic division
Contact Information
Email ID or college phone extension (if listed)

In some departments, a short write-up explains the department’s goals, academic strengths, and focus areas.

For those looking to understand who leads a particular subject stream, this information is helpful.

Why Is the Faculty Directory Important for Students?

At MIT AOE, the faculty structure plays a key role in how students access academic support, obtain approvals, and plan further studies.

Here’s why the faculty directory matters:
Follow these steps to apply for MIT AOE:
Quick access to academic contacts
Students often need help outside lecture hours — for lab queries, mini projects, or event planning.

Knowing who heads the department helps them reach out without confusion.

Clear department-level leadership
The directory lists the Head of Department (HOD) for each academic area.

This gives students a clear contact for subject or course-related matters.

Support with permissions and guidance
For approvals, project topics, or clarification on academic policies, students can directly approach their HOD through official channels.

Entry point for further academic interaction
While individual professors and lecturers aren’t listed publicly, the HOD can guide students to the right faculty members within the department.

Useful for research-focused students
Those looking to engage with research faculty or planning for higher studies can start by identifying which departments align with their interests.

Structured and reliableThe directory provides a verified, formal way to navigate the academic system.

Even without complete profiles, it supports student queries straightforwardly.

Closing Note
The university educators at MIT AOE form the backbone of its academic structure.

While full faculty listings aren’t published online, the department-level details help students find the right point of contact.

It’s a simple yet reliable system that supports clear academic communication.

Frequently Asked Questions
Getting ready to apply?

MITAOE
Faculty
All the matters related to the recruitment, establishment and welfare of faculty members and other staffs comes under the purview of the Dean, FSA. The main objective of Dean, FSA is to improve the quality of faculties and staff.
The major functions of the Office of Faculty & Staff Affairs are as mentioned below:
Recruitment process of Faculty and staff members.
Appointments of Visiting Faculty, Adjunct Faculty, Emeritus Professor, Distinguished Professor etc.
Confirmation, Extension, Re-employment, Transfer and promotion of Faculty and staff.
Issue of Service certificate,
Sanction of all types of leaves.
Faculty and staff welfare scheme.
Annual Appraisal process.
Defining the Job description, policies, HR manual etc.
Selection process of Teacher and Staff of the Year award.
Handling grievances.
Maintaining the discipline among faculty and staff.

results.title: Dr. Sunil Karad, Executive Director, Treasurer & Trustee MIT Group of Institutions | Pune | India
section_path: Dr. Sunil Karad, Executive Director, Treasurer & Trustee MIT Group of Institutions
results.text:
Dr. Sunil Karad, Executive Director, Treasurer & Trustee MIT Group of Institutions
Pune
Dr. SunilL Karad holds a PG Diploma in Strategy and Innovation from the revered Oxford University, a PhD & Masters from University of Sheffield in UK and a Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering from Pune University. He is credited with establishing 10+ new age educational institutions and going strong.
Dr. Sunil Karad is known for his abilities of comprehensive research, constructive planning and effective execution. An experienced professional in education and entrepreneurship management, he is a believer of positive outcomes. Currently Dr. Sunil is the Executive Director & Trustee at MIT Group of Institutions, being responsible for managing the growth and long-term success of various educational establishments developing a future of 50k+ learners annually.
Dr. Sunil Karad is extremely passionate about digital transformation and the founding force of Edugild: India’s global education technology accelerator for edtech startups. He leverages experience and reputation for excellence, to bring a positive impact in education and social community at large. Dr. Sunil Karad is a believer of technology being a transformation force, having supported new age ventures that leverage XR and AI to make education available and accessible to one and all.
For Appointments, Contact
Ms. Anju Hiranwar PS to Executive Director
Email: anju@mitpune.com

results.title: Best Mechanical Engineering College in Pune | MIT AOE
section_path: Best Mechanical Engineering College in Pune
results.text:
The School of Mechanical Engineering's Board of Studies was introduced for curriculum development from 2016. It is the driving factor behind our academic success. This multidisciplinary committee, comprised of prominent academic members, industry experts, and student representatives, ensures that our programs remain at the forefront of innovation and market relevance. They work together to create leading-edge courses, assess academic performance, and direct research. We constantly adapt to the ever-changing landscape of Mechanical engineering thanks to their dedication, ensuring our students obtain a top-tier education that meets the demands of today's world. Join us in congratulating them on their dedication to academic achievement and the success of our students and alumni.
MOU
A Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) is a formal agreement between a college or university and a company is a formal agreement that outlines the intentions and objectives of the collaboration between the two entities. The MOU serves as a framework for their partnership and helps establish a clear understanding of their respective roles and responsibilities. The specific objectives of an MOU can vary based on the nature of the partnership, but some common objectives includes Educational Collaboration, Research and Development, Skill Development and Training, Industry-Academia Interface, Recruitment and Talent Pipeline, Exchange Programs and Intellectual Property Rights.

results.title: B.Tech Chemical Engineering Colleges in Pune, Maharashtra | Best Colleges for Chemical Engineering in Alandi
section_path: B.Tech Chemical Engineering Colleges in Pune, Maharashtra
results.text:
B.Tech Chemical Engineering Colleges in Pune, Maharashtra
Established in 1999 under the prestigious MIT Pune Group, known for its academic prowess, MIT AOE has emerged as an institution that embodies innovation and research.

Situated in the educational hub of Pune, often referred to as the 'Oxford of the East, ' MIT AOE offers rigorous academics and practical exposure, preparing students to excel in the world of engineering.

Known as one of the prominent chemical engineering colleges in Pune, the school emphasizes on innovative teaching methodologies, research, and industry collaboration, nurturing future leaders who are prepared to tackle global challenges.

Vision and Mission
The vision and mission of MIT AOE aims to mold students into competent professionals and ethical individuals who will contribute positively to society.

About Professor & Dean of the College
MIT AOE prides itself on a team of highly qualified and dedicated faculty members.

These professionals bring a wealth of knowledge and experience to the institution, contributing to an enriching learning environment.

ACADEMICS
School Of Chemical Engineering
Our department is committed to bridging the gap between academic curriculum and industry requirements through various add-on courses like Process Engineering, Piping Engineering, and Chemical Process Automation by PLC SCADA.

Academic Programs
At MITAOE, we offer B Tech in Chemical Engineering, accredited thrice by the NBA.

Our curriculum is designed to prepare students for successful careers both in India and abroad, with many of our graduates pursuing higher studies in prestigious institutions worldwide.

The program provides exposure to entrepreneurial opportunities, project-based learning, and a supportive mechanism for preparation for higher education.

Board of Studies
Our Board of Studies ensures the curriculum is constantly updated to reflect the latest advancements in chemical engineering, keeping our students at the forefront of the field.

Faculty and Staff
The department has excellent and dedicated faculty members who provide hands-on exposure to industry-relevant software, ensuring our students are well-prepared for their professional careers.

Laboratories
State-of-the-art laboratories at MITAOE allow students to apply their knowledge in practical settings, engaging in innovative research and development projects.

Research and Development
We encourage our students to engage in research activities, fostering an environment of innovation and discovery within the field of chemical engineering.

Memorandum of Understanding (MOUs)
We've partnered with Rashtriya Chemicals and Fertilizers Ltd., Mumbai, from June 16, 2022, to June 15, 2023.

This company, owned by the Government of India, produces chemicals and fertilizers.

They offer student training and internships.

Another partnership is with Gakkel Ridge Technology, Pune, effective January 1, 2023, to December 31, 2023.

As a chemical engineering EPC consulting firm, they provide industry solutions and support student internships, project guidance, and expert lectures.

We also have an MOU with Chemika Process Engineering, Pune, covering January 2023 to December 31, 2023.

Similar to Gakkel Ridge, Chemika specializes in chemical engineering solutions, offering student internships, project guidance, and educational lectures.

ADMISSIONS
Admission Process
The admission process for the B Tech in Chemical Engineering program at MITAOE is designed for candidates who have excelled in their grade 12 board examinations with Mathematics, Physics, and Chemistry.

Eligibility also includes scores from the MHT-CET Entrance Examination or the Joint Entrance Examinations (JEE).

results.title: Dr. Amol Bapuso Rajmane | Department of Computer Engineering
results.text:
Dr. Amol Bapuso Rajmane
Department of Computer Engineering
NAME: Dr. Amol Bapuso Rajmane
DESIGNATION : Associate Professor
QUALIFICATION :
Ph.D. in Computer Science & Engineering, Pacific Academy of Higher Education & Research University, Udaipur (2018).
M.E. in Computer Science & Engineering, Walchand College of Engineering, Sangli, Shivaji University, Kolhapur.
B.E. in Computer Science & Engineering, Walchand College of Engineering, Sangli, Shivaji University, Kolhapur.
OVERVIEW OF PROFILE :
Dr. Amol Bapuso Rajmane is Associate Professor in the Department of Computer Science & Engineering, MIT Academy of Engineering, Alandi, affiliated to Savitribai Phule Pune University. He received his B.E. in Computer Science & Engineering from Walchand College of Engineering, Sangli (Shivaji University, Kolhapur), M.E. in Computer Science & Engineering from the same institution, and Ph.D. from Pacific Academy of Higher Education & Research University, Udaipur in 2018. He brings 23 years of comprehensive experience in Computer Science & Engineering education, research, and administration.
He is an accomplished academic professional with proven track record of excellence in teaching, curriculum development, research supervision, and institutional leadership. He has guided numerous B.Tech and M.Tech students in their academic endeavors and has been instrumental in fostering a strong research culture within academic institutions. He is a member of the Board of Studies in Information Technology and Computer Science & Engineering at Shivaji University. He has served as Approved PG Teacher in Shivaji University for CSE Branch and is recognized as an expert in emerging technologies.
He has an extensive research portfolio comprising over 25 publications in reputed international journals and conferences, including 6 Scopus-indexed and 4 UGC-approved journal articles, as well as publications in Google Scholar. His scholarly contributions include authorship of multiple research papers, patent filings, and significant contributions to academic leadership and institutional development. He has received recognition for teaching excellence and student mentorship throughout his career.
FORE FRONT AREA OF RESEARCH : Artificial Intelligence, Data Mining, Web Search Personalization, Query Optimization, Machine Learning Applications, Cloud Computing, Distributed Systems, and Web Technologies.
EMAIL ID : amol.rajmane@mitaoe.ac.in
CONTACT NO :
Experience (in years) Teaching, Industry and Research: Teaching : 23 Yrs., Research : 15+ Yrs.
Best Faculty Member in Computer Science & Engineering Award from Dr. J.J. Magdum College of Engineering.
Consistently received outstanding student feedback and academic results.

results.title: Ms. Disha Sengupta | Department of Computer Engineering
results.text:
Ms. Disha Sengupta
Department of Computer Engineering
NAME : Ms. Disha Sengupta
DESIGNATION :

Assistant Professor
QUALIFICATION : B.Tech (IT), M.Tech (CSE), Phd.

Pursuing
Ph.D. (Computer Science and Engineering)

Pursuing, Symbiosis International University, Lavale, Pune.

M.Tech (Computer Science and Engineering), Amity University, Noida, 2014.

B.Tech (Information Technology), Uttar Pradesh Technical University, Lucknow, 2009.

OVERVIEW OF PROFILE :
Mrs. Disha Sengupta is an Assistant Professor with over 11.8 years of experience in higher education and academic technology, currently serving as an Assistant Professor, with a strong background in Computer Science and Engineering and a Ph.D. in progress.

She holds an M.Tech in CSE and a B.Tech in Information Technology, and has demonstrated excellence in teaching, curriculum design, research, and academic administration.

Her expertise spans Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, Cloud Computing, Cyber Security, DBMS, and Operating Systems, supported by extensive faculty development programs and industry-recognized certifications.

She has published multiple research papers in reputed international journals and conferences, holds published patents in AI and computer vision domains, and actively contributes as a reviewer for IEEE, Springer, and other international journals and conferences.

Known for her commitment to outcome-based education, research innovation, and student mentoring, she has also played key roles in NAAC, NBA, curriculum development under SPPU, and institutional academic excellence initiatives.

FORE FRONT AREA OF RESEARCH : Artificial intelligence, Machine learning, Cloud Computing and Cyber Security.

EMAIL ID : disha.sengupta@mitaoe.ac.in
CONTACT

NO : 020 – 30253500
EXPERIENCE : Teaching: 11.8 years
Worked as Course Coordinator/Member in designing the curriculum for S.E. (Artificial Intelligence and Data Science) 2024 under the Board of Studies (Computer Engineering), Faculty of Science and Technology, Savitribai Phule Pune University, during the workshop held on 7th May 2025, sponsored by SPPU and organized at AISSMSCOE, Pune.

Worked as a Reviewer for the 7th IEEE International Conference on Emerging Smart Computing and Informatics (IEEE ESCI-2025).

Worked as a Reviewer for the International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Engineering, Healthcare and Sciences (ICAIEHS-2025), Springer Nature.

Worked as a Reviewer for the 2nd International Conference on Business Intelligence, Computational Mathematics, and Data Analytics.

Worked as a Jury Member at the institute-level project exhibition "Tech-Navinya 2k24".

Lifetime member of IDES (Membership No. 5058).

Working as a Reviewer in the International Journal of Advance Foundation and Research in Computer (IJAFRC).

INTERNATIONAL JOURNALS
Disha Sengupta, “BT-GEN: A Retrieval-Augmented and BT-Classified Approach for Enhancing Cognitive Assessment Through Automated MCQ Generation and Classification, ” International Journal of Environmental Sciences, Vol. 11, No. 22s, 2025, ISSN: 2229-7359.

results.title: Top Engineering Programs - MIT Academy of Engineering
section_path: Top Engineering Programs - MIT Academy of Engineering
results.text:
A diverse range of the Departmental Electives (Digital Image Processing, Microwave Engineering, RISC Processors, Deep Learning, Fiber Optic communications, Biomedical Engineering, Natural Language Processing, Electric Vehicles and Speech Signal Processing) is also offered by the Department.

The Department has introduced specialization verticals in the area of Robotics and Automation, Internet of Things and Embedded System over a duration of four semester starting from T.Y.B.Tech.

This would lead to an additional minor degree for students.

These courses are developed in consultation with the renowned industry experts with an endeavor to prepare our students to the industry expectation level.

The Department gives special emphasize on developing hands on skills by introducing various hardware and software skill labs such as MATLAB, Java, C++, CCNA and Embedded Linux, LABVIEW.

The Department has also received the grants form AICTE under MODEROB and has introduced state of the art equipments like high-frequency structure simulator.

‘HFSS USRP SDR bundle’

Civil Engineering
College
Institute
Admission 2020
An Autonomous Institute Affiliated to Savitribai Phule Pune University.
Curriculum with emphasis on creativity, communication, collaboration and life skills.(Education 4.0).
One of the Top Engineering Institutions in Pune.
341 + student get placed in 2019-20 academic year.
Accredited thrice by The National Board Of Accreditation (NBA)
Part of MIT Group, Pune.
Curriculum with emphasis on innovation, problem solving and project based learning. (Industry 4.0)
Choice based syllabus.
Sports Facility.
Clubs for student personal development.
"You and I come by road or rail, but economists travel on infrastructure" said, Margaret Thatcher, the first woman prime minister of United Kingdom.
Civil Engineering, being the backbone of infrastructural development of any country, deals with planning, design and construction of buildings, dams, bridges, tunnels etc. and takes care of provision of water resources, Water and sewage treatment facilities. Civil engineering graduates have huge demand as project managers, structural consultants, construction engineers in wide variety of fields like public works, roadways, railways, armed forces and engineering services.

The Department of Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering is one of the principal academic movers at MIT Academy of Engineering, which facilitates students to specialize in the field of telecommunication. The main objective of the department is to impart strong background of theory and practical in communication Engg. including satellite, wireless and optical, mobile, audio and video etc. The UG program is accredited by NBA (National Board of Accreditation) and ISO 9001:2008 certified.
The program offered is well known for its applied nature including a strong laboratory component and considerable project work. The degree represents an excellent combination of basic engineering science, electronics and communication theory and practice, communication skills and engineering management.

Mr. Chaitanya Patil is Assistant Professor in the School of Computer Engineering and Technology, MIT Academy of Engineering. He received B.E in Information Science and Engineering 61.25% in 2009 from BLDEA’s VP Dr. P.G.Halakatti CET, Vijaaypur, Karnataka, 2009 and M.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering in 2012 from Dr. Ambedkar Institute of Technology, Bengaluru.

results.title: Best Autonomous Engineering College in Pune| MIT Academy of Engineering
section_path: Best Autonomous Engineering College in Pune
results.text:
Best Autonomous Engineering College in Pune
MIT Academy of Engineering
The MIT Academy of Engineering (MIT AOE) is a well-known autonomous engineering college in the Alandi neighborhood of Pune. The institute, which was founded in 1999, has emerged as a pioneer in the area of engineering education and research. MIT AOE has consistently been ranked among the top engineering colleges in Pune and India, with a strong emphasis on innovation, industry collaborations, and interdisciplinary learning.
In this blog, we are going to discuss what makes MIT AOE an excellent college of engineering.
Affiliation and Accreditations
MIT AOE is an autonomous college affiliated with SavitriBai Phule University (SPPU).
The institute is approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE).
It has also got approval from the Government of Maharashtra.
The institute is accredited by NAAC with an ‘A’ grade for all programs.
In addition, the institute should also have the 2(F) & 12(B) status of the UGC.
The institute has made a name for itself through academic and research excellence, and it continues to expand as a 'Centre of Excellence' in engineering education and research.
It has ranked 1st in Maharashtra & 11th in India amongst the finest Private Engineering Colleges by Outlook Survey.
Why is MIT AOE the Best Autonomous Engineering College in Pune?
There are many reasons why MIT AOE is considered the best autonomous college in Pune. Let us elaborate on some of them:
Industry Oriented Curriculum
The curriculum at MIT AOE is designed to provide students with a well-rounded education that includes theoretical knowledge as well as practical experience. Mechanical Engineering, Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering, Computer Engineering, Chemical Technology, and Civil Engineering are among the undergraduate programs available at the college. The courses are updated regularly to reflect the most recent industry trends and technologies.

OVERVIEW OF PROFILE :
Dr. Amol Bapuso Rajmane is Associate Professor in the Department of Computer Science & Engineering, MIT Academy of Engineering, Alandi, affiliated to Savitribai Phule Pune University. He received his B.E. in Computer Science & Engineering from Walchand College of Engineering, Sangli (Shivaji University, Kolhapur), M.E. in Computer Science & Engineering from the same institution, and Ph.D. from Pacific Academy of Higher Education & Research University, Udaipur in 2018. He brings 23 years of comprehensive experience in Computer Science & Engineering education, research, and administration.
He is an accomplished academic professional with proven track record of excellence in teaching, curriculum development, research supervision, and institutional leadership. He has guided numerous B.Tech and M.Tech students in their academic endeavors and has been instrumental in fostering a strong research culture within academic institutions. He is a member of the Board of Studies in Information Technology and Computer Science & Engineering at Shivaji University. He has served as Approved PG Teacher in Shivaji University for CSE Branch and is recognized as an expert in emerging technologies.
He has an extensive research portfolio comprising over 25 publications in reputed international journals and conferences, including 6 Scopus-indexed and 4 UGC-approved journal articles, as well as publications in Google Scholar. His scholarly contributions include authorship of multiple research papers, patent filings, and significant contributions to academic leadership and institutional development. He has received recognition for teaching excellence and student mentorship throughout his career.
FORE FRONT AREA OF RESEARCH : Artificial Intelligence, Data Mining, Web Search Personalization, Query Optimization, Machine Learning Applications, Cloud Computing, Distributed Systems, and Web Technologies.

The MIT Academy of Engineering (MIT AOE) is a well-known autonomous engineering college in the Alandi neighborhood of Pune. The institute, which was founded in 1999, has emerged as a pioneer in the area of engineering education and research. MIT AOE has consistently been ranked among the top engineering colleges in Pune and India, with a strong emphasis on innovation, industry collaborations, and interdisciplinary learning.
In this blog, we are going to discuss what makes MIT AOE an excellent college of engineering.
Affiliation and Accreditations
MIT AOE is an autonomous college affiliated with SavitriBai Phule University (SPPU).
The institute is approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE).
It has also got approval from the Government of Maharashtra.
The institute is accredited by NAAC with an ‘A’ grade for all programs.
In addition, the institute should also have the 2(F) & 12(B) status of the UGC.
The institute has made a name for itself through academic and research excellence, and it continues to expand as a 'Centre of Excellence' in engineering education and research.
It has ranked 1st in Maharashtra & 11th in India amongst the finest Private Engineering Colleges by Outlook Survey.
Why is MIT AOE the Best Autonomous Engineering College in Pune?
There are many reasons why MIT AOE is considered the best autonomous college in Pune. Let us elaborate on some of them:
Industry Oriented Curriculum
The curriculum at MIT AOE is designed to provide students with a well-rounded education that includes theoretical knowledge as well as practical experience. Mechanical Engineering, Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering, Computer Engineering, Chemical Technology, and Civil Engineering are among the undergraduate programs available at the college. The courses are updated regularly to reflect the most recent industry trends and technologies.

results.title: Aniket D. Gundecha | School of E&TC Engineering
results.text:
Aniket D. Gundecha
School of E&TC Engineering
NAME : Dr. Aniket D. Gundecha
DESIGNATION : Associate Professor
QUALIFICATION :
Ph.D. (Electronics & Telecommunication Engineering), SSGMCOE, Shegaon, India.2019
M. E. (Electronics & Telecommunication), MIT Academy of Engineering, Alandi (D), India, 2011.
B. E. (Electronics & Telecommunication), Pune Institute of Computer Technology, Pune, India, 2007.
OVERVIEW OF PROFILE :
Dr. Aniket D. Gundecha is an Associate Professor in the School of E&TC Engineering. His research interests cover Uncertainty and Disturbance Estimation, Observer Designs, Active Disturbance Rejection Control for Linear and Nonlinear Systems, Hybrid Renewable Energy Sources, Energy Scavenging, Embedded Control Design for Control Systems.
Dr. Aniket D. Gundecha holds Ph.D. in Electronics & Telecommunication Engineering from Shree Sant Gajanan Maharaj College of Engineering, Shegaon, India. He has various publications in journals, conferences and book chapters of national and international repute. He is a member of various professional societies like International Association of Engineers, and Indian Nuclear Society.
FORE FRONT AREA OF RESEARCH : Systems and Control
EMAIL ID : adgundecha@mitaoe.ac.in
CONTACT NO : 020 30253500 Ext: 1086
EXPERIENCE : Teaching: 14 years, Industry: 1.5 years
